stories.title: VEVOR Baby Swings Recalled for Suffocation Hazard — Stop Use Immediately

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: RECALL: VEVOR baby swings (~1,020 units) — suffocation risk. Violates Safe Sleep for Babies Act. Models BB501K/BB702A/BB005K. Stop use immediately. Cut cover in half, write Recalled on base. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: RECALL: VEVOR baby swings (~1,020 units) — suffocation risk. Violates Safe Sleep for Babies Act. Models BB501K/BB702A/BB005K. Stop use. Cut cover in half, write Recalled on base. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-3
x_posts.text: VEVOR baby swings recalled — ~1,020 units sold on Amazon and VEVOR.com Jan–Aug 2025, $65–$80. Call 855-599-6320 (Mon–Fri 9AM–5PM PT). Full instructions at cpsc.gov. Stop use today. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: VEVOR Baby Swings Recalled for Suffocation Hazard: What Parents Need to Do Now

#### Image Concept 1A — Social (1080x1350, X)
**Mode:** base_only
**Prompt:** A single empty infant swing with soft white and gray fabric seat, hanging still in a bright airy nursery. Morning light streams through a sheer white curtain. The swing is unoccupied and motionless. Clean open floor space in the bottom third with gentle soft shadows on light hardwood. No text, no overlays, no watermarks. Warm protective mood, modern baby product aesthetic, studio-lit.

#### Image Concept 1B — Social (1200x630, Facebook)
**Mode:** base_only
**Prompt:** An empty infant baby swing with white and gray fabric seat sitting still in a bright modern nursery. Soft morning light from a window on the left. The swing frame is neutral-toned metal. Room is clean and minimal. Lower portion of the image shows clean hardwood floor with soft shadows. No text, no overlays, no watermarks. Cautionary but calm mood, clean product photography aesthetic.

stories.title: Uuoeebb Infant Walkers Recalled for Three Simultaneous Safety Failures

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: RECALL: Uuoeebb infant walkers (~2,650 units) let babies roll through doorways and fall down stairs. Head entrapment hazard too. Stop use, disassemble, write Recalled on tray. See cpsc.gov. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: RECALL: Uuoeebb infant walkers (~2,650 units) let babies roll through doorways and fall down stairs. Head entrapment risk too. Stop use, disassemble, write Recalled on tray. cpsc.gov [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-3
x_posts.text: Uuoeebb infant walkers fit through doorways and fail to stop at step edges. ~2,650 units. Amazon Dec 2024–Sep 2025, $60–$90. Email Uuoeebbrecalls@outlook.com to complete the recall. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Portal Pool Closed All Summer — A 1945 Coal Mine Shaft Is Why, and Here's Where to Swim Instead

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Portal Pool (3535 N. Hancock Ave) is closed all summer — likely years more. A 1945 coal mine shaft sits 25 feet below. Three public pools are open in Colorado Springs this summer. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Portal Pool Is Closed for Years — Here's Where to Swim in Colorado Springs This Summer

Warm joyful summery community mood, vibrant outdoor photography, full midday sun.

stories.title: D11 Considers $775M School Bond for November Ballot — What COS Families Need to Know

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: D11 may put a $775M school bond on the November ballot. Avg building is 58 years old. Would fund AC, repairs, modernizations + a $10K teacher raise. Board votes end of summer. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D11 Considers $775 Million Bond for November Ballot: What It Means for Colorado Springs Schools

Afternoon golden light. Bottom third is clean green grass and concrete sidewalk. No text, no overlays, no watermarks. Thoughtful community-minded mood, architectural documentary photography, natural afternoon light.

**Mode:** base_only

Green lawns stretch across the foreground. Golden afternoon sunlight. A few small figures visible near the school entrance. Lower portion shows clean green grass and a concrete path. No text, no overlays, no watermarks. Hopeful community mood, architectural photography, natural golden-hour light.

stories.title: 1 in 5 US Teens Use AI Chatbots for Mental Health Advice — Most Haven't Told Anyone

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: 1 in 5 US teens use AI chatbots for mental health advice — and 63% haven't told anyone. JAMA Pediatrics, June 2026. Parents: start the conversation before they turn to ChatGPT. [URL] #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting
